issues.claim: Voice consistent with chapter 7 declarative-revelatory register
issues.objection: 7.30 speaks in chapter 7's declarative-revelatory voice (per thesis): the senior who has taught technique through chapters 2-6 now reveals what they have actually understood. Voice does not slip into productivity-blog cadence; does not slip into mystical cadence. STRETCHED tagging is explicit where the verse's metaphysical reach exceeds the operational analog. Coheres with the typology-and-veiling sub-register active across 7.13-7.30. The STRETCHED tag is honest for this verse: Chapter-closing verse. Heavy metaphysics: adhibhūta/adhidaiva/adhiyajña + prayāṇa-kāla. Forward-pointer to Ch 8 honored explicitly. Engineering analog scoped at career-end-departure substrate-articulation. Counter-example: performative all-hands talk that does not survive the team's actual problems is the failure mode.

notes: Voice in 7.30 is the senior-engineer-revealing voice the chapter has earned by this point. PASS.
